name: The Jackpot That Never Quite Pays
text:
Whenever any player rolls a die or flips a coin, put a Cherry counter on The Jackpot That Never Quite Pays.
{T}: Pull the lever. If there are exactly 7, or 77, or 777 Cherry counters on it (you have to catch it at the exact moment), you HIT THE JACKPOT: win the game. If you pull and it's any other number — and it is always, always any other number — you lose ½ of your life, rounded up, rounded down, and emotionally.
flavorText: It pays out 99.97% of the time, the sign claims, in letters too small to read and a font that does not exist.

extras.dice: counter accrues off all rolls/flips; exact-number win con
